name: nsd-nusantara-spiritual-donation
description: Platform donasi darurat, transparansi dana, pengajuan bantuan, dan konseling NSD.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
